meta.title: LDS Labs — Developer Products Built to Help You Ship Faster
meta.description: LDS Labs builds developer products and starters focused on production-ready foundations. The first product, Spring Boot SaaS Starter, helps teams move to faster software delivery. Join the early access list.
meta.keywords: developer products, spring boot starter, saas boilerplate, java saas starter, production-ready spring boot, developer tools
meta.ogTitle: LDS Labs — Stop rebuilding the foundation. Start shipping.
meta.ogDescription: Developer products and starters built around production-ready foundations. First release: Spring Boot SaaS Starter, currently in development.
meta.twitterTitle: LDS Labs — Stop rebuilding the foundation. Start shipping.
meta.twitterDescription: Developer products and starters built around production-ready foundations. First release: Spring Boot SaaS Starter, currently in development.

hero.title: Stop rebuilding the foundation. Start shipping your Spring Boot SaaS.
hero.subtitle: A production-ready Spring Boot foundation for developers building SaaS products — skip the boilerplate and start on the business logic that actually matters. Still in development: join the waitlist for early access and a say in what ships first.

product.name: Spring Boot SaaS Starter
product.description: A production-ready starting point for Spring Boot SaaS products. It already makes the infrastructure decisions every team repeats, so you can go from clone to your first business rule in hours, not weeks.

included.name: Spring Boot 4
included.detail: Built on the current major version from day one

included.name: Flyway
included.detail: Every schema change versioned and repeatable

included.name: Docker
included.detail: The same environment from your laptop to production

included.name: OpenAPI
included.detail: API docs generated from the code, always in sync

included.name: GitHub Actions
included.detail: Tests and builds run on every push, no setup required

included.name: Feature-based architecture
included.detail: Code organized by business capability, not technical layer

planned.name: RBAC
planned.detail: Role-based permissions for teams and accounts

planned.name: Multi-tenancy
planned.detail: Isolated data per customer, built in

benefits.title: Why teams will start here
benefits.subtitle: The unglamorous parts of every SaaS project, already handled — with nothing hidden.

items.title: Weeks of setup, gone
items.description: Clone a starter that already made the hard infrastructure calls, and open your first feature file the same day.

items.title: Business logic first
items.description: Spend day one writing the rules that make your product different, not wiring up a database connection.

items.title: Every decision explained
items.description: Each architectural choice ships with the reasoning behind it, so your team understands the why, not just the how.

items.title: Code you keep, not rent
items.description: A starting point you own outright: read it, change it, and grow past it with no vendor lock-in.

roadmap.title: Where LDS Labs is headed
roadmap.description: Spring Boot SaaS Starter is the first product built under the LDS Labs name. The same focus on production-ready foundations is planned to extend into more starters, reusable modules, developer tools, templates, and AI-assisted products across different stacks.
roadmap.note: Built in public — this roadmap updates as work progresses.

waitlist.title: Get early access
waitlist.description: Leave your name and email to get early access to the Spring Boot SaaS Starter, plus occasional updates as it's built in public.

betaInterest.label: I'd like to take part in the beta program

waitlist.successMessage: We'll keep you updated as development progresses.
waitlist.localNoticeMessage: Early access isn't open yet. This form isn't connected to a live service, so nothing was submitted — please check back soon.
waitlist.validationErrorMessage: We couldn't submit your request. Please check your name and email and try again.
waitlist.errorMessage: Something went wrong sending your request. Please try again in a moment.
waitlist.privacyNote: No spam. Only product updates and early access invitations.

errors.name: Please enter your name.
errors.email: Please enter a valid email address.

footer.tagline: Developer products built to help you ship faster.

privacy.metaDescription: How {{brand}} collects, uses and protects the data submitted through this website.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains what information {{brand}} collects through this website, why we collect it, and how you can exercise your rights over it. It reflects our current practices only and is not legal advice or a guarantee of compliance with any specific law.

whoWeAre.title: Who we are
whoWeAre.body: {{brand}} is an independent project building developer products and tools, currently in its early-access stage.

dataCollected.title: Data we collect
dataCollected.intro: When you use the early-access form or otherwise interact with this website, we may collect:
items: Your name
Your email address
An optional indication of interest in participating in our beta program
Basic technical data that may be automatically processed by our hosting infrastructure or by Formspree, such as IP address, date/time and request information, where applicable
Your language preference, stored only in your browser via localStorage

howCollected.title: How we collect it
items: Through the early-access waitlist form
Through your direct interaction with the website
Through technical processing necessary to deliver the website to your browser

purposes.title: Why we collect it
items: To manage the early-access waitlist
To send product updates
To send early-access or beta invitations
To respond to contact requests
To help prevent abuse or security issues
purposes.note: We do not use your data for behavioral advertising, and we do not sell it to third parties.

legalBasis.title: Legal basis
legalBasis.intro: Depending on your jurisdiction, we rely on:
items: Your consent, for communications and the waitlist
Steps taken at your request, when applicable
Our legitimate interest, strictly limited to what is necessary for the security and functioning of the website, when applicable

sharing.title: Sharing and processors
sharing.intro: We work with a small number of service providers who process data on our behalf:
items: Formspree — processes and stores waitlist form submissions
Vercel — hosts and delivers this website
Hostinger — provides email and DNS services, where applicable
sharing.note: These providers may process technical data according to their own terms and privacy policies. We do not sell your data to anyone.

internationalTransfers.title: International transfers
internationalTransfers.body: Formspree, Vercel and other infrastructure providers we use may process data in countries other than your own. We do not claim a specific country of processing without confirming it first, and we aim to work with providers that maintain reasonable data protection safeguards.

retention.title: How long we keep your data
retention.body: We keep your data only for as long as it's needed to manage the waitlist, send communications, run the beta program, meet legal obligations, or resolve disputes. You can request deletion at any time. We have not yet defined a fixed retention period.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.intro: Depending on applicable law, you may have the right to:
items: Confirm whether we process your data
Access your data
Correct inaccurate data
Request deletion of your data
Be informed about who we share your data with
Withdraw your consent at any time
Object to or request restriction of certain processing, where applicable
Request data portability, where applicable

exerciseRights.title: How to exercise your rights
exerciseRights.body: Send an email to {{email}} with the subject "Privacy Request". We may ask for reasonable information to confirm your identity and protect your data before acting on your request.

security.title: Security
security.body: We adopt reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect your data. No method of transmission or storage is completely secure, so we can't guarantee absolute security.

children.title: Children and teenagers
children.body: This website is not intentionally directed at children, and we do not knowingly collect data from them. If you believe a child has provided us with personal data, please contact us so we can address it.

cookies.title: Cookies and local storage
cookies.body: We do not currently use advertising or analytics cookies. Your language preference may be stored in your browser through localStorage. Some technical providers may use strictly necessary technologies required to operate the service.

communications.title: Communications
communications.body: You can stop receiving messages from us at any time by emailing us and requesting removal. If we introduce a newsletter in the future, we intend to add an unsubscribe link directly to those messages.

changes.title: Changes to this policy
changes.body: We may update this policy from time to time. Meaningful changes will be reflected by updating the effective date at the top of this page.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: If you have any questions about this policy or how we handle your data, reach out to us:
